channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Trump offers a public show of support for Pete Hegseth, his embattled nominee to lead the Pentagon
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump is offering a public show of support for Pete Hegseth, his embattled choice to lead the Pentagon.
item.dc:creator: Colleen Long, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Elon Musk funded a super PAC comparing Trump's position on abortion to Ruth Bader Ginsburg's
item.description: Elon Musk was the sole funder of a super PAC that focused on advertising likening Donald Trump’s stance on abortion to that of late Supreme Court Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg.
item.dc:creator: Meg Kinnard, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Minnesota U.S. Attorney Andy Luger to step down ahead of Trump transition
item.description: U.S. Attorney Andy Luger is stepping down soon as the top federal law enforcement official in Minnesota. As is custom for political appointees, he’s resigning to make way for a yet-to-be-announced successor chosen by incoming President Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: Matt Sepic, MPR News

item.title: Here's what Kash Patel's former colleagues are saying about him
item.description: Kash Patel has an extensive national security and intelligence background, and officials say when looking at his résumé "objectively," he is "one of the most experienced people ever to be nominated" to lead the FBI.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump nominates Brandon Judd as ambassador to Chile
item.description: Brandon Judd was the president of the National Border Patrol Council, which represents around 18,000 Border Patrol agents and support personnel. He officially retired from the post on May 18.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, NewsNation

item.title: Trump names former Sen. David Perdue of Georgia to be ambassador to China
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump is naming former Sen. David Perdue of Georgia to be his ambassador to China.
item.dc:creator: Colleen Long And Aamer Madhani, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Kim Salas concedes in District 5 Board of Supervisors race
item.description: Kim Salas, the challenger to Kern County 5th District Supervisor Leticia Perez's seat, has conceded the race, falling just 133 votes short of defeating the incumbent.
item.dc:creator: Jose Franco, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: House rejects Democratic efforts to force release of Matt Gaetz ethics report
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The House shut down Democrats' efforts Thursday to release the long-awaited ethics report into former Rep. Matt Gaetz, pushing the fate of any resolution to the yearslong investigation of sexual misconduct allegations into further uncertainty.
item.dc:creator: FARNOUSH AMIRI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Charlamagne tha God rips Newsom over moves to 'Trump-proof' California
item.description: Radio host Charlamagne tha God ripped California Gov. Gavin Newsom (D) over his moves to “Trump-proof” California in the weeks following the president-elect's victory.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hegseth faces senators' concerns not only about his behavior but also his views on women in combat
item.description: Minnesotan Pete Hegseth has spent the week on Capitol Hill trying to reassure Republican senators that he is fit to lead President-elect Donald Trump’s Department of Defense in the wake of high-profile allegations about excessive drinking and sexual assault.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Mexico president will ask Trump to deport non-Mexican migrants directly to their home countries
item.description: MEXICO CITY (AP) — Mexico’s president said Thursday she will ask President-elect Donald Trump to deport non-Mexican migrants directly to their home countries, rather than dumping them at the Mexican border.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Russia's top military officer gave his US counterpart advance notice of Mediterranean Sea drills
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Russia's top military officer called his U.S. counterpart to give advance warning of Russia's drills in the Mediterranean Sea, officials said Thursday, in what was a rare contact amid high tensions between Moscow and Washington. Russia's General Staff chief, Gen.
item.dc:creator: LOLITA C. BALDOR and ELLEN KNICKMEYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Head of Democratic Caucus says thin House margins make attendance vital next year
item.description: The head of the House Democratic Caucus is sending an early message to his troops heading into the 119th Congress: Attendance will be crucial given the razor-tight margins in the lower chamber. “It’s important for every member to come to work and to do their job.
item.dc:creator: Mike Lillis, NewsNation

item.title: Fani Willis ordered to turn over communications in Trump case to conservative group
item.description: A Georgia judge ordered Fulton County District Attorney Fani Willis to turn over to a conservative watchdog group any communications she may have with special counsel Jack Smith or the now-disbanded House Jan. 6 committee.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, NewsNation

item.title: Trump changes White House counsel pick, tapping David Warrington
item.description: Trump in a statement said Warrington would serve as the top attorney in the White House and as assistant to the president.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: Trump taps ex-aide Peter Navarro for senior counselor on trade and manufacturing
item.description: President-elect Trump on Wednesday named his once-jailed former aide Peter Navarro as senior counselor for trade and manufacturing to the incoming White House, picking a loyal ally to help implement broad plan for tariffs. Navarro served as White House trade adviser in Trump’s first term.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, NewsNation

item.title: Montana lawmakers cross the aisle to block a trans bathroom ban in the state capitol
item.description: Some Republicans joined Democrats in rejecting the measure, which would have restricted bathroom access. Rep. Zooey Zephyr, Montana's first openly transgender legislator, won a second term last month.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Treisman, MPR News

item.title: Trump transition signs MOU with DOJ to facilitate FBI background checks
item.description: President-elect Trump’s transition team announced Tuesday it had signed a memorandum of understanding (MOU) with the Justice Department, which will allow the FBI to conduct background checks for certain individuals chosen for the incoming administration.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: Pete Hegseth’s mother says The New York Times made ‘threats’ by asking her to comment on a story
item.description: A basic tenet of journalism — calling someone for comment on a story — was seen as a threat by defense secretary nominee Pete Hegseth’s mother.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Minnesota House panel votes to absorb legal fees of DFLer in employment dispute
item.description: A DFL state lawmaker will have legal fees covered by the Minnesota House after alleging her rights were violated by an outside employer. Republicans say the move sets a bad precedent.
item.dc:creator: Brian Bakst, MPR News

item.title: Ocasio-Cortez first person to hit a million followers on Bluesky
item.description: The platform’s features are based off of Twitter, and they include the ability to message fellow users as well as a discover and feed tab.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, Fox 5

item.title: Unions score a major win in Wisconsin with a court ruling restoring collective bargaining rights
item.description: Wisconsin public worker and teachers unions have scored a major legal victory with a ruling that restores collective bargaining rights they lost under a 2011 state law.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: U.S. will send Ukraine $725 million more in arms
item.description: President Joe Biden has pledged to spend all of the military assistance funds Congress approved this year for Ukraine before the end of his administration on Jan. 20, 2025.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Sen. Omar Fateh announces candidacy for Minneapolis mayor, says Frey is ‘failing’ residents
item.description: The first Somali elected to the Minnesota Senate is now seeking to lead the states largest city. Sen. Omar Fateh announced Monday he will challenge incumbent, and fellow DFLer Jacob Frey for the mayor’s office.
item.dc:creator: Cari Spencer, MPR News

item.title: Hegseth forced out of vets groups due to drinking, misconduct: New Yorker
item.description: The incidents — relayed in a trail of documents and corroborated to The New Yorker by the accounts of former colleagues — took place prior to Hegseth becoming a full-time Fox News TV host in 2017.
item.dc:creator: Ellen Mitchell, Fox 5

item.title: Biden pardons his son Hunter despite previous pledges not to
item.description: President Joe Biden has pardoned his son, Hunter, sparing the younger Biden a possible prison sentence for federal felony gun and tax convictions and reversing his past promises not to use the extraordinary powers of the presidency for the benefit of his family members.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Trump picks longtime ally Kash Patel to replace current FBI director
item.description: The president-elect plans to replace current FBI Director Christopher Wray with Patel, a close ally of the president-elect and former national security aide, has berated the Justice Department and the news media.
item.dc:creator: Carrie Johnson, MPR News

item.title: Canadian Prime Minister Trudeau flies to Florida to meet with Trump after tariffs threat
item.description: WEST PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — Canadian Prime Minister Justin Trudeau flew to Florida on Friday to have dinner with President-elect Donald Trump at his Mar-a-Lago club after Trump threatened to impose sweeping tariffs on Canadian products.
item.dc:creator: ROB GILLIES and FATIMA HUSSEIN, Associated Press, Fox 5
